queries.question: Please display concerts and theater plays held at a venue with a capacity of 700.
queries.sql:
SELECT Concert.title
FROM Venue JOIN Concert ON Venue.id = Concert.venue_id
WHERE Venue.venue_capacity = 700
UNION
SELECT Theater_Play.title
FROM Venue JOIN Theater_Play ON Venue.id = Theater_Play.venue_id
WHERE Venue.venue_capacity = 700
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?venue a :Venue .
    ?concert a :Concert .
    ?concert p:hasVenue ?venue .
    ?concert p:title ?title .
    ?venue p:venue_capacity ?venue_capacity_f .
    FILTER((STR(?venue_capacity_f) = "700" || STR(?venue_capacity_f) = "700.0"))
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?venue a :Venue .
    ?theater_play a :Theater_Play .
    ?theater_play p:hasVenue ?venue .
    ?theater_play p:title ?title .
    ?venue p:venue_capacity ?venue_capacity_f .
    FILTER((STR(?venue_capacity_f) = "700" || STR(?venue_capacity_f) = "700.0"))
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}
